idea-plugin.name: GOL Check - Anti-Hallucination Layer
idea-plugin.description:
Ask Check before you run it.

Validate any shell command against the Check engine from inside your IDE: select text and right-click, or use Tools > Check, and the verdict comes back in one round trip: runnable or invalid. Deterministic, no AI inside. Check first asks your own shell whether each binary exists, then the edge rules on the rest.

The same engine that gates AI coding agents. This plugin answers when you ask; the automatic pre-execution hook that blocks hallucinated commands in Claude Code, Cursor, and Gemini CLI installs from the one location:
npx @golproductions/check --install

No signup. A free key is activated on first use. 120 free checks every day. After that, $0.0068 AUD per check. Credits never expire.

Documentation · Pricing · Blog

action.description: Validate a shell command before running it
Validate selected text as a command
